title: QUIC & UDP Performance
description: Analyze the performance benefits of QUIC over TCP, including 0-RTT connection establishment. Deconstruct how independent stream multiplexing in QUIC mitigates Head-of-Line blocking. Explain QUIC's connection migration feature for seamless IP address changes.
objectives: Analyze the performance benefits of QUIC over TCP, including 0-RTT connection establishment.
Deconstruct how independent stream multiplexing in QUIC mitigates Head-of-Line blocking.
Explain QUIC's connection migration feature for seamless IP address changes.
